cards.name: hū
definitions: (classical particle similar to 於|于[yú]) in

cards.name: yú
definitions: (of time or place) in; at; on

cards.name: yún
definitions: short name for Yunnan _南|_南[Yún nán]

cards.name: jiè
definitions: (used in combination with 給|给[gěi] or 出[chū] etc) to lend
to make use of; to avail oneself of
(sometimes followed by 著|着[zhe]) by; with

cards.name: mào
definitions: to emit; to give off; to send out (or up, forth)
to falsely adopt (sb's identity etc); to feign

cards.name: bīng
definitions: (of an object or substance) to feel cold

cards.name: jué
definitions: (of a dam etc) to breach or burst

cards.name: gāng
definitions: just; only a short while ago

cards.name: shuā
definitions: (fig.) to remove; to eliminate (from a contest); to fire (from a job)

cards.name: bàn
definitions: to take care of (a matter); to deal with (a task, procedure etc); to organize (an event)
to establish; to set up; to manage; to run (an enterprise)
(law) to handle; to investigate; to prosecute (a case or suspect)
(bound form) office (as in 招_|招_[zhāo bàn], admissions office) (abbr. for _公室|_公室[bàn gōng shì])

cards.name: shǐ
definitions: title of an official historian in ancient China

cards.name: fù
definitions: to return to a normal or original state

cards.name: xià
definitions: the Xia or Hsia dynasty c. 2000 BC

cards.name: jì
definitions: the last month of a season

cards.name: ān
definitions: to calm; to set at ease

cards.name: dìng
definitions: to fix; to set; to make definite
to subscribe to (a newspaper etc); to book (tickets etc); to order (goods etc)

cards.name: céng
definitions: to pile on top of one another

cards.name: shān
definitions: (coll.) small bundle of straw for silkworms to spin cocoons on

cards.name: jǐ
definitions: sixth of the ten Heavenly Stems 十天干[shí tiān gān]

cards.name: shì
definitions: (literary) to trade; to buy and sell goods

cards.name: gān
definitions: taken in to nominal kinship; adoptive; foster

cards.name: guài
definitions: to find strange; to regard as odd

cards.name: zǒng
definitions: anyway; after all; eventually; sooner or later

cards.name: yuàn
definitions: to wish (that sth may happen); may ...

cards.name: sǎo
definitions: to sweep (with a brush or broom)
to sweep away; to wipe out; to get rid of
to sweep (one's eyes etc) over; to scan

cards.name: bǎ
definitions: to hold a baby in position to help it urinate or defecate

cards.name: tí
definitions: to carry (hanging down from the hand)

cards.name: bān
definitions: to move (sth relatively heavy or bulky)

cards.name: yì
definitions: I Ching; Book of Changes (abbr. for _經|_经[Yì jīng])

cards.name: gēng
definitions: one of the five two-hour periods into which the night was formerly divided
watch (e.g. of a sentry or guard)

cards.name: chu
definitions: Chinese kingdom during the Spring and Autumn and Warring States Periods (722–221 BC)

cards.name: hé
definitions: (bound form) (on restaurant menus) rice noodles _粉[hé fěn]

cards.name: zhù
definitions: (bound form) to pour into; to flow into; to inject
(bound form) to focus (one's spirit, gaze etc) on a single point; to concentrate
to annotate; to provide explanatory notes on a written text

cards.name: yǎn
definitions: to perform (a play etc); to stage (a show)
(bound form) to develop; to play out; to carry out (a task)

cards.name: shāo
definitions: to burn; to set on fire
to heat (over a fire); to boil (water, tea etc)

cards.name: pá
definitions: to get up or sit up

cards.name: wù
definitions: (literary) the outside world as distinct from oneself; people other than oneself

cards.name: yòng
definitions: to use; to make use of; to employ
to need; to have to (usu. used in the negative or in questions)

cards.name: huà
definitions: to draw (a line) (variant of the character meaning: to cut, to slash, to scratch (cut into the surface of sth), to strike (a match))
stroke of a Chinese character (variant of the character meaning: to cut, to slash, to scratch (cut into the surface of sth), to strike (a match))

cards.name: mù
definitions: mesh size; grit size (abbr. for _數|_数[mù shù])

cards.name: zhí
definitions: Zhi (c. 2000 BC), fifth of the legendary Flame Emperors 炎帝[Yán dì] descended from Shennong 神農|神农[Shén nóng] Farmer God

cards.name: xiāng
definitions: fret on the neck of a pipa 琵琶[pí pa] (a fret on the soundboard is called a 品[pǐn])

cards.name: zhù
definitions: to wish (sb bon voyage, happy birthday etc)
person who invokes the spirits during sacrificial ceremonies

cards.name: bǐ
definitions: writing brush; writing implement (pen, pencil etc) (CL:支[zhī],枝[zhī])
(bound form) style of writing; literary manner; technique of brushwork

cards.name: suàn
definitions: to count; to be valid; to carry weight
to regard as; to consider (to be ...)

cards.name: lǜ
definitions: (slang) (derived from _帽子|_帽子[lǜ mào zi]) to cheat on (one's spouse or boyfriend or girlfriend)

cards.name: wǎng
definitions: to net; to catch with a net

cards.name: zhě
definitions: (after a verb or adjective) one who (is) ...

cards.name: jiǎo
definitions: leg (of an animal or an object)

cards.name: jié
definitions: solar term (one of the 24 divisions of the year in the traditional Chinese calendar)

cards.name: shān
definitions: jacket with open slits in place of sleeves

cards.name: bèi
definitions: used to indicate passive voice (placed before the doer of the action like "by" in English passive-voice sentences, or, if the doer is not mentioned, before the verb)

cards.name: cí
definitions: a form of lyric poetry, flourishing in the Song dynasty 宋朝[Sòng cháo] (CL:首[shǒu])

cards.name: yuè
definitions: generic word for peoples or states of south China or south Asia at different historical periods

cards.name: yù
definitions: (bound form) to encounter; to happen upon; to meet unplanned

cards.name: ā
definitions: prefix used before monosyllabic names, kinship terms etc to indicate familiarity
(bound form) Afghanistan (abbr. for _富汗[A fù hàn])
(bound form) Albania (abbr. for _爾巴尼亞|_尔巴尼亚[A ěr bā ní yà])

cards.name: fù
definitions: to be close to; to be attached

cards.name: gù
definitions: to look after; to take into consideration; to attend to

cards.name: mǎ
definitions: horse or cavalry piece in Chinese chess

phrases.name: běi fāng
definitions: China north of the Yellow River

phrases.name: cí yǔ
definitions: word (general term including monosyllables through to short phrases)

phrases.name: fā shāo
definitions: to have a high temperature (from illness)

phrases.name: fā xiàn
definitions: to notice; to become aware of
to discover; to find; to detect

phrases.name: gǎn mào
definitions: (coll.) to be interested in (often used in the negative)

phrases.name: jiàn miàn
definitions: to meet; to see each other

phrases.name: jiě jué
definitions: to solve; to resolve; to settle (a problem)
to eliminate; to wipe out (an enemy, bandits etc)

phrases.name: kōng tiáo
definitions: air conditioner (including units that have a heating mode)

phrases.name: nǔ lì
definitions: to make an effort; to try hard; to strive

phrases.name: pǔ tōng huà
definitions: Putonghua (common speech of the Chinese language)

phrases.name: rèn wéi
definitions: to believe; to think; to consider; to feel

phrases.name: shàng wǎng
definitions: (of a document etc) to be uploaded to the Internet
(tennis, volleyball etc) to move in close to the net

phrases.name: suī rán
definitions: although; even though (often used correlatively with 是 or 是 etc)

phrases.name: wèi le
definitions: for; for the purpose of; in order to

phrases.name: xiāng xìn
definitions: to be convinced (that sth is true); to believe; to accept sth as true

phrases.name: xìng qù
definitions: interest (thing in which one is interested); hobby

phrases.name: xū yào
definitions: to need; to want; to demand; to require

phrases.name: yù dào
definitions: to meet; to run into; to come across

phrases.name: yī zhí
definitions: continuously; always; all the way through

phrases.name: yǐ wéi
definitions: to think (i.e. to take it to be true that ...) (Usually there is an implication that the notion is mistaken – except when expressing one's own current opinion.)

phrases.name: zháo jí
definitions: to feel a sense of urgency; to be in a hurry

phrases.name: zhù yì
definitions: to take note of; to pay attention to

phrases.name: zhōng jiān
definitions: in the middle; within; between; among

phrases.name: zì diǎn
definitions: Chinese character dictionary (containing entries for single characters, contrasted with a 词_, which has entries for words of one or more characters)

phrases.name: ài hào
definitions: to like; to be fond of; to take pleasure in; to be keen on
